summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of JMLPH landing page completed. All 13 features tested and verified working correctly. No Gulf Office present, London Office with correct address, all mailto links functional, policy modals working, mobile navigation responsive, and all navigation links scroll correctly.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement recommended

passed_tests: Header shows Aretion Publishing Group logo and text correctly
Hero section displays acquisition statement text
Journal Metrics section shows '(as of 2026)' subtitle
Metrics animated count-up values reach correct final numbers (231, 35, 43, 19, 109, 46%)
Indexing databases section renders with 12 clickable logo links
Contact section shows ONLY London Office with correct address '71-75, Shelton Street, Covent Garden, London, WC2H 9JQ'
NO Gulf Office anywhere on the page - verified
Footer shows all 4 policy links (Privacy Notice, Terms of Use, Code of Conduct, Anti-Bribery Policy)
All 4 policy modal popups open correctly when clicked
Mobile responsive navigation works - hamburger menu opens with all nav items
All navigation links scroll to correct sections (Home, About, Metrics, Current Issue, Submit)
Current Issue displays 6 articles with links to OJS portal
Desktop navigation shows all 5 nav items plus Access Journal button
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: DialogContent components missing aria-describedby for accessibility - consider adding DialogDescription component
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0 requirements verified: Gulf Office removed, London address correct (71-75, Shelton Street, Covent Garden, London, WC2H 9JQ), Aretion Publishing Group branding in place, all mailto links point to Editorial.Board@JMLPH.net, 12 indexing databases with clickable links, all 4 policy modals functional, mobile navigation working.
